description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a natural light wood finish. It features three main sections: two pedestal units on either side, each containing three drawers, and a central section with an open shelf above a wide drawer. The desk top is broad and flat, providing ample workspace, while the pedestals offer significant storage capacity. The back of the desk is plain, with a single circular cable management hole in the central section. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for professional or administrative environments.
description: A spacious, light wood desk with two sets of drawers on each side and a central open shelf with a large drawer beneath. The design is practical and offers extensive storage and workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sets of three drawers on each side and a central open shelf above a wide drawer.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel of the desk with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing plain panels and a single circular cable management hole in the central section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a solid, featureless side panel.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features two sets of drawers and a central open shelf with a large drawer beneath, while the back is plain with a cable management hole.
attribute_usage_context: administrative workstation or executive office desk
